title: DoctorReport
description: System health report emitted by the Doctor diagnostic system. Contains timestamp, overall health status, and detailed check results.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the health check was performed

healthy.description: Overall system health status. True if all checks passed.

domain.description: Logical domain or subsystem being checked (e.g., memory, capability, ingestion, connector, authority, currency, config)

status.description: Check result status: pass (healthy), warn (degraded), or fail (critical)

detail.description: Detailed message explaining the check result

remediation.description: Optional suggested action to resolve the issue if status is not pass
